subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto them that dwell in the Kingdom of Utterance, that the fragrances of Revelation may draw them unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی ملکوت البیان لتجذبهم نفحات الوحی الی الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
